---
title: "aggregation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}


library(tidyverse)
library(here)


```

```{r}

df <- read_csv(here("data", "nato_constituency_combined_revised .csv"))



df_summary <- df %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = level,
    values_from = mean
  ) %>%
  group_by(const_name) %>%
  summarise(
    remain_nato = sum(remain_nato, na.rm = TRUE),
    leave_nato  = sum(leave_nato,  na.rm = TRUE),
    dont_know   = sum(dont_know,   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    net_score = remain_nato - leave_nato,
    across(c(remain_nato, leave_nato, dont_know, net_score), ~ . * 100)
  )





write.csv(df_summary, here("output", "nato_constituency_summary_revised.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


range(df_summary$leave_nato)
range(df_summary$net_score)
